# services.rsync

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.rsync`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.rsync.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable periodic directory syncing via rsync. |
| `services.rsync.jobs` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Synchronization jobs to run. |
| `services.rsync.jobs.<name>.destination` | `string` | Destination directory. |
| `services.rsync.jobs.<name>.group` | `string` | The name of an existing user group under which the rsync process should run. |
| `services.rsync.jobs.<name>.inhibit` | `list of string matching the pattern ^[^:]+$` | Run the rsync process with an inhibition lock taken; see {manpage}`systemd-inhibit(1)` for a list of possible operations. |
| `services.rsync.jobs.<name>.settings` | `attribute set of (boolean or string or signed integer or floating point number or list of (boolean or string or signed integer or floating point number))` | Settings that should be passed to rsync via long options. See {manpage}`rsync(1)` for available options. |
| `services.rsync.jobs.<name>.sources` | `non-empty (list of string)` | Source directories. |
| `services.rsync.jobs.<name>.timerConfig` | `null or (attribute set of (systemd option))` | When to run the job. |
| `services.rsync.jobs.<name>.user` | `string` | The name of an existing user account under which the rsync process should run. |
| `services.rsync.package` | `package` | The rsync package to use. |
